prompt: A first-person perspective shot of a user looking at a retro-futuristic wrist-mounted computer resembling a Pip-Boy. The device has a weathered olive-drab metal casing, various analog dials, a glowing orange power button, and a radiation gauge. A hand on the right side is adjusting a large black dial. The curved screen of the device is displaying the classic video game Super Mario Bros, specifically World 1-1. The game is rendered in monochrome green CRT pixel art with scanlines, showing the player character facing an enemy near a pipe and floating blocks, with text at the top reading "MARIO 000100", a coin icon with "x00", "WORLD 1-1", and "TIME 388". The background is a blurred post-apocalyptic wasteland in daylight.
